# General organization

**Project management** Join the [[Trello
board]{.underline}](https://trello.com/invite/b/692c74e0b2121867a430b564/ATTI1507ba7728cb894bf512a0c1fe2a09e4E7B40728/cell-cycle-project)

**Store your code** in [[github
repo]{.underline}](https://github.com/farkkilab/cellcycle)

**Presentations** to be shared here:
[[Presentations]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1zFydw2z-PalFRm52URsxSPhPOIvfrNbg?usp=drive_link)

**Figures** to be shared here:
[[Figures]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Tj_uYWe7wf2O0iycOpdIisLNyrVTA-BM?usp=drive_link)

**Internal communication** via slack channel

Main information sources:

- L-Drive (Projects/CellCycle) -\> clinical info, HEs, WES info

- P-Drive:

 - H304 for all Discovery dataset (images + data analysis)

 - H30492 for

 - Expansion cycif

 - Xenium

 - GeoMx

 - Proteomics

File naming system (for analysis and other intermediate files):

- Date (yyyymmdd)

- Specific file description

30492 for

 - Expansion cycif

 - Xenium

 - GeoMx

 - Proteomics

File naming system (for analysis and other intermediate files):

- Date (yyyymmdd)

- Specific file description

- Initials (if multiple people working on the same thing)

> *Eg: 20251205_Xenium-panel-suggestions_AJ.csv*

#

Comment on project number agreement (Xenium) All Xenium analysis/meeting
files will be stored as Project 34, as this is a collaboration and it is
easier to have it separate for data sharing across projects/labs.
Experimentally, we will handle the pre/post xenium cycif as #4, since
many of the antibodies and experimental setting are related to the cell
cycle project and it is easier to track from the wet-lab side

[Comment from 03-09-2025]{.underline}

Blocks to be used in Xenium experiment will get destroyed to get part of
the tissue out and accommodate it to new blocks. That is why Saun got

omment from 03-09-2025]{.underline}

Blocks to be used in Xenium experiment will get destroyed to get part of
the tissue out and accommodate it to new blocks. That is why Saun got
some serial sections (6 per block) - that we will use in other
experiments. Out of these sections:

- #1 is used for HE to assess tissue quality and location of tumor
 > mass

- #3 is used for Expansion CycIF

- #6 is used for tCycIF pre-screening

### Clinical data for the Expansion project

- :L:\\Projects\\4_CellCycle\\clinical_data\\Expansion\\cleaned_data
